name: bc-blog-craft-config-migration — dev
postCreateCommand: pipx install uv 2>/dev/null || true; uv tool install 'git+https://github.com/derio-net/super-fr#subdirectory=packages/fr' || true

fr.purpose: blog-craft dev: render-template (go>=1.22), image-gen+validators (python3 pyyaml/google-genai/pillow), Hugo-extended build/serve, mermaid validation (node); tests=tests/smoke-*.sh under BLOG_CRAFT_TEST_MODE (offline)
